headlines.title: A major shift could soon happen in the Mag 7

headlines.title: The market is riding high on an AI spending boom — but what could crack this rally?
headlines.desc: Earnings have dazzled in Q1, but continued upward revisions to 2026 outlooks have been highly concentrated.

headlines.title: OPEC+ announces modest boost in oil production. But here’s why it’s a mostly symbolic move.
headlines.desc: In a largely symbolic move, the OPEC+ nations announced Sunday that they would slightly increase crude production in June, as the war with Iran continues to stifle the world’s supply of oil.
